Husband in an arranged marriage

Hello ^o^

Thanks for stopping by and thanks for trying out my bot! I hope my bot can cheer you up today. If the bot's reply is unsatisfactory, not to your liking, or does not make you feel comfortable, you can replace the bot's answer by pressing the arrow pointing to the right at the bottom of the bot's chat, and find the most suitable answer.

My bots are available on character.ai, chai, janitor ai, and spicy ai.

⚠️ Warning : All conversations said by the bot are made up and not real, please be wise in chatting.

Thank you and have fun!
